records.desc: A&H Pet Scents Deodorizing Gel Beads - Fresh Breeze
records.narrative: The plan is back-loaded — only 53% of the volume is in the first 13 weeks. But this account's buying pattern shows stronger near-term demand (74% front-half). If they pull early, you may not have the inventory to support it. The plan is more than double what buying history supports in 19 weeks: W6 (5,235 planned vs. 1,776 expected), W7 (5,235 planned vs. 2,280 expected), W8 (4,330 planned vs. 1,200 expected) and 16 more weeks. That's 62,772 units above what we'd expect. If there's a known driver — promotion, new store rollout, distribution gain — this needs documentation. Otherwise this is a high risk of overstock.
records.comment: this looks under projected vs history. Can you explain why?
